detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Ryokugyu._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Ryokugyu.sol#677-801):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (Ryokugyu.sol#741)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (Ryokugyu.sol#815-827)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (Ryokugyu.sol#747)
		- _developmentAddress.transfer(amount.mul(50).div(100)) (Ryokugyu.sol#835)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount.mul(50).div(100)) (Ryokugyu.sol#837)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Ryokugyu.sol#799)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (Ryokugyu.sol#963)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (Ryokugyu.sol#943)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (Ryokugyu.sol#945)
	Ryokugyu._rOwned (Ryokugyu.sol#339) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Ryokugyu._takeTeam(uint256) (Ryokugyu.sol#957-965)
	- Ryokugyu._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (Ryokugyu.sol#917-953)
	- Ryokugyu.balanceOf(address) (Ryokugyu.sol#503-507)
	- Ryokugyu.constructor() (Ryokugyu.sol#437-467)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Ryokugyu.sol#799)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (Ryokugyu.sol#971)
	Ryokugyu._rTotal (Ryokugyu.sol#351) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Ryokugyu._getCurrentSupply() (Ryokugyu.sol#1121-1133)
	- Ryokugyu._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (Ryokugyu.sol#969-975)
	- Ryokugyu.constructor() (Ryokugyu.sol#437-467)
	- Ryokugyu.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (Ryokugyu.sol#599-621)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [Ryokugyu._transfer(address,address,uint256)](Ryokugyu.sol#L677-L801):

		- [uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp)](Ryokugyu.sol#L815-L827)

		- [_marketingAddress.transfer(amount.mul(50).div(100))](Ryokugyu.sol#L837)
	State variables written after the call(s):

		- [_rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam)](Ryokugyu.sol#L963)
		- [_rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount)](Ryokugyu.sol#L943)
		- [_rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount)](Ryokugyu.sol#L945)
	[Ryokugyu._rOwned](Ryokugyu.sol#L339) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [Ryokugyu._takeTeam(uint256)](Ryokugyu.sol#L957-L965)
	- [Ryokugyu._transferStandard(address,address,uint256)](Ryokugyu.sol#L917-L953)
	- [Ryokugyu.balanceOf(address)](Ryokugyu.sol#L503-L507)
	- [Ryokugyu.constructor()](Ryokugyu.sol#L437-L467)
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](Ryokugyu.sol#L799)
		- [_rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee)](Ryokugyu.sol#L971)
	[Ryokugyu._rTotal](Ryokugyu.sol#L351) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [Ryokugyu._getCurrentSupply()](Ryokugyu.sol#L1121-L1133)

	- [Ryokugyu.tokenFromReflection(uint256)](Ryokugyu.sol#L599-L621)
